machine_id.description: The machine ID this snapshot belongs to.

root_id.description: The root ID this snapshot belongs to.

created_at.description: The time the snapshot was created.

scan_config_hash.description: The hash of the scan configuration used.

inventory_ref.description: Optional reference to the inventory artifact.

dirs_ref.description: Optional reference to the dirs artifact.

summary_ref.description: Optional reference to the summary artifact.

content_ref.description: Optional reference to the content artifact.

topology_ref.description: Optional reference to the topology artifact.

hotspots_ref.description: Optional reference to the hotspots artifact.

workspaces_ref.description: Optional reference to the workspaces artifact.

description: Complete snapshots must contain at least one valid artifact reference depending on the executed scan mode.
